forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 62. West wind around 5 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 78. North wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the evening unfurls over Boston, a gentle canvas of mostly cloudy skies invites the cool embrace of night. The air lingers at an amiable 62 degrees, whispering promises of a serene Sunday, where the dawn will usher in a day sprinkled with moments of sunshine caressed by a mild north wind. The prospect of rain, a mere flicker of possibility, dances lightly in the background, adding a touch of intrigue to the unfolding hours; a slight chance of showers may grace the city after 11 a.m. but nothing too substantial.

Given the cool air stirring outside, a comfortable approach to attire would serve you well—perhaps light pants paired with a soft, long-sleeved shirt to shield against the remnants of night’s chill, punctuated by a light jacket for those early hours. The daylight hours promise to be pleasant, ideal for a serene stroll along the Charles or a leisurely dip into the quaint cafés scattered through the cobblestone streets. Seek a small park to soak in the gentle warmth, take your time savoring an afternoon read, and allow the world to pass by in a gentle blur, for this day is woven with tranquil moments, waiting to be embraced.
